channel.title: BTC War Market Guides
channel.description: Guides to live Bitcoin price, market depth, order flow, and the BTC War visualization.

item.title: BTC Price Today: What 24-Hour Change, Volume, and Market Depth Mean
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: A practical guide to rolling 24-hour BTC statistics, spread, depth, liquidity, and executed order flow.

item.title: Bitcoin Price, Market Depth, and Order Flow: A Practical Glossary
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: Definitions and relationships for Bitcoin price, spread, order-book liquidity, market depth, executed order flow, and buy/sell pressure.
